user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new attendance auditors group, so that I can define who audits attendance for a location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Attendance Auditors Group screen; When I click Add new attendance auditors group and provide a panel name, description and applicable location; Then the new auditors group is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view auditors groups in a list showing panel name, description and applicable location, so that I can see all configured audit panels at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given attendance auditors groups exist; When I open the Attendance Auditors Group screen; Then each group is listed with its panel name, description and panel applicable location

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing auditors group, so that I can keep panel membership and locations up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given an auditors group is listed; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the auditors group list, so that I always see the latest saved panels
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Attendance Auditors Group screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
